options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: character
options.description:
The name of the character that you will play or "New Character" if you will be making a new
character for it

options.name: character_profession
options.description: Profession of the character you will play

options.name: character_race
options.description: Race of the character you will play

options.name: starting_mainhand_weapon
options.description:
Sets your starting mainhand weapon.

none: Do not start with a mainhand weapon. Only valid if you select an offhand.  Some offhand weapons are difficult
    to do damage with, so be careful with this option.
random/random_proficient: Selects a mainhand or two-handed weapon your character is proficient with.
random_proficient_one_handed: Selects a one-handed weapon that your profession is proficient with.
random_proficient_two_handed: Selects a two-handed weapon that your profession is proficient with.

options.name: starting_offhand_weapon
options.description:
Sets your starting offhand weapon.
This will be ignored if a two-handed weapon was selected for starting_mainhand_weapon

none: Do not start with an offhand weapon. Only valid if you select a mainhand.
random/random_proficient: Selects an offhand weapon your character is proficient with.

options.name: group_content
options.description:
Sets what kind of group content you are interested in. Please be respectful of other players and do not join
pugs doing difficult content if you do not have the unlocks to contribute (Don't try to fight Dhuum naked)

none: Limits game to open world, story, and WvW (if competitive is selected)
five_man: Also allows fractals, dungeons, and PvP (if competitive is selected)
ten_man: Also allows raids and strikes

options.name: include_competitive
options.description: Allows PvP and WvW achievements to be included

options.name: achievement_weight
options.description: The probability weight of any location being an achievement

options.name: quest_weight
options.description: The probability weight of any location being a quest

options.name: max_quests
options.description:
The maximum number of quest locations to generate. The number of quests in each storyline are as follows:

Core => 49,
Season1 => 30,
Season2 => 32,
HeartOfThorns => 16,
Season3 => 36,
PathOfFire => 16,
Season4 => 30,
IcebroodSaga => 41,
EndOfDragons => 27,
SecretsOfTheObscure => 20,

options.name: training_weight
options.description: The probability weight of any location being a skill/trait unlock

options.name: max_training
options.description:
The maximum number of training locations to generate. The number of training in each storyline are as follows:

Core => 49,
Season1 => 0,
Season2 => 0,
HeartOfThorns => 16,
Season3 => 0,
PathOfFire => 16,
Season4 => 0,
IcebroodSaga => 0,
EndOfDragons => 27,
SecretsOfTheObscure => 0,

options.name: world_boss_weight
options.description: The probability weight of any location being a world boss

options.name: unique_item_weight
options.description: The probability weight of any location being a purchase from a heart vendor (or similar for maps without hearts)

options.name: poi_weight
options.description: The probability weight of any location being a point of interest (includes waypoints, vistas, and hero points)

options.name: storyline
options.description: Storyline to focus on for PvE content

options.name: mist_fragments_required
options.description: The number of "Mist Fragment" items required to complete this world

options.name: extra_mist_fragment_percent
options.description:
Multiplier to determine how many extra Mist Fragments to create. For example if mist_fragments_required is 20
and this is value is 50, there will be 30 Mist Fragments in the multi-world,
but only 20 will be required to finish.

options.name: heal_skill
options.description: A random core heal skill could be placed early or given to the player as a starting skill

options.name: gear_slots
options.description: Gear slots could be placed early or given to the player at the start

options.name: storyline_items
options.description:
Which skills, traits, and weapons do you want shuffled into the item pool
all: all skills, traits, and weapons
core: only core skills, traits, and weapons
storyline: limit to core items plus those from the selected storyline. Living World storylines include the items
    from their associated expansion
storyline_plus: all items from the selected storyline and all preceding storylines.
